task_completion.visual_evidence: The NextGen Connect (Mirth Connect) Administrator dashboard or channel list shows a channel explicitly named 'Order_Closed_Loop'.

task_completion.description: Configure the source to receive HL7 messages on TCP port 6661
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Source configuration tab for the channel shows the connector type as 'TCP Listener' and the Local Port set to '6661'.

task_completion.description: Configure a destination to forward messages to the Lab Simulator on port 6670
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Destination configuration tab shows a 'TCP Sender' (or similar network sender) with the Remote Address set to 'localhost' or '127.0.0.1' and the Remote Port set to '6670'.

task_completion.description: Extract the Control ID (MSH-10) and Reference ID (MSA-3 from ACK)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A transformer, response transformer, or JavaScript step shows logic mapping or extracting 'MSH.10' (or MSH['MSH.10']) and 'MSA.3' (or MSA['MSA.3']) from the response message.

task_completion.description: Configure a database update for the 'lab_orders' table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Destination (e.g., Database Writer) or JavaScript step shows a SQL query like 'UPDATE lab_orders SET lab_reference_number = ... WHERE order_control_id = ...' using the mirthdb database and postgres user.

task_completion.description: Process the sample order and update the database
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NextGen Connect dashboard shows successful message processing (Received/Sent counts > 0) OR a terminal/database client shows a SELECT query on 'lab_orders' where the row with 'ORD-001' has a populated 'lab_reference_number'.

integrity.description: The agent used the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI to configure the channel
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the NextGen Connect Administrator Java application interface, rather than just writing XML configuration files in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually update the database to fake success
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show the agent manually executing an 'UPDATE lab_orders SET...' command via psql or another database client.

integrity.description: The agent actually sent the sample HL7 message through the engine
integrity.visual_evidence: The NextGen Connect dashboard statistics show actual message counts (e.g., Received: 1, Sent: 1) for the 'Order_Closed_Loop' channel, or a tool like 'Send Message' or 'nc' is seen transmitting the sample_order.hl7 file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The NextGen Connect channel must receive on TCP port 6661 and send to localhost:6670. The database connection URL is jdbc:postgresql://nextgen-postgres:5432/mirthdb. The sample HL7 message has Control ID 'ORD-001'. The channel must extract MSH-10 (Control ID) and MSA-3 (Reference ID from the ACK) to perform the database update.
